g.text: _handleBridgeMessage(amountReceived: uint256, msgType: uint32, nonce: uint64, body: bytes) <<MasterWOTokenStrategy>>
_send(token: address, amount: uint256, msgType: uint32, nonce: uint64, body: bytes, userFunded: bool) <<AbstractCrossChainV3Strategy>>
receiveMessage(address, address, amountReceived: uint256, payload: bytes) <<onlyInboundAdapter>> <<AbstractCrossChainV3Strategy>>
<<event>> RewardTokenCollected(recipient: address, rewardToken: address, amount: uint256) <<InitializableAbstractStrategy>>
<<event>> BridgeRequested(bridgeId: bytes32, sender: address, recipient: address, amount: uint256, fee: uint256, callData: bytes, callGasLimit: uint32) <<AbstractWOTokenStrategy>>
<<event>> BridgeDelivered(bridgeId: bytes32, recipient: address, amount: uint256) <<AbstractWOTokenStrategy>>
<<event>> BridgeCallSucceeded(bridgeId: bytes32, recipient: address, amount: uint256) <<AbstractWOTokenStrategy>>
<<event>> BridgeCallFailed(bridgeId: bytes32, recipient: address, amount: uint256, returnData: bytes) <<AbstractWOTokenStrategy>>
<<event>> WithdrawClaimAcked(nonce: uint64, yieldBaseline: uint256, success: bool) <<MasterWOTokenStrategy>>
<<event>> BalanceCheckResponded(nonce: uint64, yieldBaseline: uint256, remoteTimestamp: uint256) <<MasterWOTokenStrategy>>
